arts.ttl: Roberto De Zerbi confirms Valentin Rongier will start against Monaco
arts.sum: Roberto De Zerbi has confirmed in his pre-match press conference that Valentin Rongier (29) will start for Olympique de Marseille when they host AS Monaco at the Stade Vélodrome on…

arts.ttl: “I don’t want to copy and paste” – De Zerbi dodging Brighton repeat at Marseille, learned lessons with Seagulls
arts.sum: Roberto de Zerbi has insisted he won’t “copy and paste” what he did at Brighton and Hove Albion with Marseille as he wants the French side to be “more dominant.” So Foot cover comments from the Marseille boss today from his pre-match press conference ahead of the clash with AS Monaco on Sunday evening. arts.ttl: Marseille leading race for Juventus’ Nicolo Fagioli
arts.sum: Serie A giants Juventus could be nearing a sale of midfielder Nicolo Fagioli in the winter transfer window and French side Marseille are leading the race for him. La Gazzetta…
